summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OTP authentication flow update from Firebase to custom API. Most features working correctly with minor validation issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Phone number validation not working - no error shown for invalid phone numbers (less than 10 digits)

passed_tests: Login screen shows 'Get OTP' button (correct text, not 'Send OTP')
Login screen calls Send OTP API successfully (POST https://devapi.intownlocal.com/IN/otp/)
Login screen shows loading state while sending OTP ('Sending OTP...')
OTP screen shows 4 input boxes (correct, not 6)
OTP screen shows masked phone number (******3210)
OTP screen shows 'OTP sent successfully' indicator
OTP screen has 30-second resend timer working correctly
OTP screen calls Verify OTP API (POST https://devapi.intownlocal.com/IN/otp/verify)
OTP screen shows error message on invalid OTP ('OTP verification failed. Invalid or expired OTP.')
No Firebase references found in login.tsx, otp.tsx, utils/api.ts, or authStore.ts
External OTP APIs are functional and responding correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix phone number validation on login screen - should show error message when phone number is less than 10 digits
